title: erigeron oxyphyllus
intro: Erigeron oxyphyllus, also known as Pale Fleabane or Oxyphyllus Fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Erigeron oxyphyllus include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Erigeron oxyphyllus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used as a topical application for skin issues, such as wounds and eczema.
